```{r}
    title_text = paste0("PM + POST↑, MAX stable (n=", length(genes_PM_POST_up), ")"), n = 1
  )
}

if (length(genes_PM_POST_down) > 0) {
  plots[["PM+POST↓"]] <- plot_simple_trajectories(
    gene_ids = genes_PM_POST_down, count_data = b6_gene_counts,
    title_text = paste0("PM + POST↓, MAX stable (n=", length(genes_PM_POST_down), ")"), n = 1
  )
}

if (length(plots) > 0) {
  wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 3, guides ="collect" ) & theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  }else NULL


```

## Gene Lists

```{r}
#| label: domain-dynamics-gene-lists
#| warning: false
#| message: false

gene_list_tbl <- bind_rows(
  if (length(genes_PM_only_up) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "PM↑ only", gene_id = genes_PM_only_up),
  if (length(genes_PM_only_down) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "PM↓ only", gene_id = genes_PM_only_down),
  if (length(genes_MAX_only_up) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "MAX↑ only", gene_id = genes_MAX_only_up),
  if (length(genes_MAX_only_down) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "MAX↓ only", gene_id = genes_MAX_only_down),
  if (length(genes_POST_only_up) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "POST↑ only", gene_id = genes_POST_only_up),
  if (length(genes_POST_only_down) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "POST↓ only", gene_id = genes_POST_only_down),
  if (length(genes_PM_MAX_up) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "PM+MAX↑", gene_id = genes_PM_MAX_up),
  if (length(genes_PM_MAX_down) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "PM+MAX↓", gene_id = genes_PM_MAX_down),
  if (length(genes_MAX_POST_up) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "MAX+POST↑", gene_id = genes_MAX_POST_up),
  if (length(genes_MAX_POST_down) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "MAX+POST↓", gene_id = genes_MAX_POST_down),
  if (length(genes_PM_POST_up) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "PM+POST↑", gene_id = genes_PM_POST_up),
  if (length(genes_PM_POST_down) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "PM+POST↓", gene_id = genes_PM_POST_down)
)

if (nrow(gene_list_tbl) > 0) {
  gene_list_tbl |>
    left_join(b6_domain_slopes_clean |> distinct(gene_id, symbol)) |>
    select(Pattern, gene_id, symbol) |>
    arrange(Pattern, symbol) |>
    create_dt()
}
```

## Over-representation Analysis Results

```{r}
#| label: combined-domain-specific-ora
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: hide
#| cache: true

ora_PM_only_up <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_PM_only_up, 
                                           description = "PM↑ only")
ora_PM_only_down <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_PM_only_down, 
                                             description = "PM↓ only")
ora_MAX_only_up <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_MAX_only_up, 
                                            description = "MAX↑ only")
ora_MAX_only_down <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_MAX_only_down, 
                                              description = "MAX↓ only")
ora_POST_only_up <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_POST_only_up, 
                                             description = "POST↑ only")
ora_POST_only_down <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_POST_only_down, 
                                               description = "POST↓ only")
ora_PM_MAX_up <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_PM_MAX_up, 
                                          description = "PM+MAX↑")
ora_MAX_POST_up <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_MAX_POST_up, 
                                            description = "MAX+POST↑")
ora_PM_POST_up <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_PM_POST_up, 
                                           description = "PM+POST↑")

```


```{r}
#| label: combined-domain-specific-ora-table
#| warning: false
#| message: false

domain_specific_ora_results <- bind_rows(
  safe_result(ora_PM_only_up), 
  safe_result(ora_PM_only_down),
  safe_result(ora_MAX_only_up), 
  safe_result(ora_MAX_only_down),
  safe_result(ora_POST_only_up), 
  safe_result(ora_POST_only_down),
  safe_result(ora_PM_MAX_up), 
  safe_result(ora_MAX_POST_up), 
  safe_result(ora_PM_POST_up)
)

if (!is.null(domain_specific_ora_results) && nrow(domain_specific_ora_results) > 0) {
  domain_specific_ora_results |>
    filter(p_value < 0.01) |>
    create_dt()
}
```



:::

# Complex Trajectory Patterns

Genes with particularly complex spatiotemporal dynamics including **all domains changing** (at different rates) or **opposite trajectories** across domain pairs.

::: {#B6_complex .panel-tabset .nav-pills}

## Overview

```{r}
#| label: complex-overview
#| warning: false
#| message: false

tibble(
  Pattern = c(
    "All domains↑ (different rates)", "All domains↓ (different rates)",
    "Any opposite slopes", "Three-way divergent"
  ),
  N_Genes = c(
    length(genes_all_increasing), length(genes_all_decreasing),
    length(genes_opposite_slopes), length(genes_three_way_divergent)
  )
) |> create_dt()
```

## Trajectory Examples

`r length(genes_all_increasing)` genes increase and `r length(genes_all_decreasing)` genes decrease in all three domains (at different rates). `r length(genes_opposite_slopes)` genes have at least one domain pair with opposite trajectories, and `r length(genes_three_way_divergent)` genes show significant but different slopes across all three domains.

```{r}
#| label: complex-examples
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 8

plots <- list()

if (length(genes_all_increasing) > 0) {
  plots[["All↑"]] <- plot_trajectory_with_slopes(
    gene_ids = genes_all_increasing, count_data = b6_gene_counts,
    slope_data = b6_domain_slopes,
    title_text = paste0("All Domains↑ (n=", length(genes_all_increasing), ")"), n = 1
  )
}

if (length(genes_all_decreasing) > 0) {
  plots[["All↓"]] <- plot_trajectory_with_slopes(
    gene_ids = genes_all_decreasing, count_data = b6_gene_counts,
    slope_data = b6_domain_slopes,
    title_text = paste0("All Domains↓ (n=", length(genes_all_decreasing), ")"), n = 1
  )
}

if (length(genes_opposite_slopes) > 0) {
  plots[["Opposite"]] <- plot_trajectory_with_slopes(
    gene_ids = genes_opposite_slopes, count_data = b6_gene_counts,
    slope_data = b6_domain_slopes,
    title_text = paste0("Opposite Slopes (n=", length(genes_opposite_slopes), ")"), n = 1
  )
}

if (length(genes_three_way_divergent) > 0) {
  plots[["3-way"]] <- plot_trajectory_with_slopes(
    gene_ids = genes_three_way_divergent, count_data = b6_gene_counts,
    slope_data = b6_domain_slopes,
    title_text = paste0("Three-Way Divergent (n=", length(genes_three_way_divergent), ")"), n = 1
  )
}

if (length(plots) > 0) wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2, guides = "collect") & theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

## Gene Lists

```{r}
#| label: complex-gene-lists
#| warning: false
#| message: false

gene_list_tbl <- bind_rows(
  if (length(genes_all_increasing) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "All domains↑", gene_id = genes_all_increasing),
  if (length(genes_all_decreasing) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "All domains↓", gene_id = genes_all_decreasing),
  if (length(genes_opposite_slopes) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "Opposite slopes", gene_id = genes_opposite_slopes),
  if (length(genes_three_way_divergent) > 0) tibble(Pattern = "Three-way divergent", gene_id = genes_three_way_divergent)
)

if (nrow(gene_list_tbl) > 0) {
  gene_list_tbl |>
    left_join(
      trajectory_patterns |> distinct(gene_id, symbol, PM_log2FoldChange, MAX_log2FoldChange, POST_log2FoldChange),
      by = "gene_id"
    ) |>
    mutate(across(c(PM_log2FoldChange, MAX_log2FoldChange, POST_log2FoldChange), ~ round(., 2))) |>
    rename(PM = PM_log2FoldChange, MAX = MAX_log2FoldChange, POST = POST_log2FoldChange) |>
    select(Pattern, gene_id, symbol, PM, MAX, POST) |>
    arrange(Pattern, symbol) |>
    create_dt()
}
```

## Over-representation Analysis Results

```{r}
#| label: complex-ora
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: hide
#| cache: true

ora_all_increasing <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_all_increasing, 
                                               description = "All↑")
ora_all_decreasing <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_all_decreasing, description = "All↓")
ora_opposite <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_opposite_slopes, description = "Opposite slopes")
ora_three_way <- run_enrichment_hybrid_v2(gene_ids = genes_three_way_divergent, description = "Three-way divergent")
```

```{r}
#| label: complex-ora-table
#| warning: false
#| message: false

complex_ora <- bind_rows(
  safe_result(ora_all_increasing),
  safe_result(ora_all_decreasing),
  safe_result(ora_opposite),
  safe_result(ora_three_way)
)
if (!is.null(complex_ora) && nrow(complex_ora) > 0) {
  complex_ora |>
    filter(p_value < 0.01) |>
    create_dt()
}
```



:::

# Pattern Summary

::: {#B6_pattern_summary .panel-tabset .nav-pills}

## Overall Summary

```{r}
#| label: overall-summary
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# Create comprehensive summary
pattern_summary_all <- tibble(
  Category = c(
    rep("Domain Main Effects", 11),
    rep("Stage Main Effects", 4),
    rep("Trajectory: Opposite", 6),
    rep("Trajectory: Co-increasing", 6),
    rep("Trajectory: Co-decreasing", 6),
    rep("Domain-Specific: Single", 6),
    rep("Domain-Specific: Two", 6),
    rep("Complex", 4)
  ),
  Pattern = c(
    # Domain main effects
    "MAX higher than PM", "MAX lower than PM",
    "POST higher than PM", "POST lower than PM",
    "POST higher than MAX", "POST lower than MAX",
    "Highest in MAX", "Highest in POST", "Highest in PM",
    "A→P decreasing", "A→P increasing",
    # Stage main effects
    "All↑ (common)", "All↓ (common)", "Strong↑", "Strong↓",
    # Opposite trajectories
    "MAX↑ PM↓", "MAX↓ PM↑", "POST↑ PM↓", "POST↓ PM↑", "POST↑ MAX↓", "POST↓ MAX↑",
    # Co-increasing
    "MAX vs PM: MAX faster", "MAX vs PM: PM faster",
    "POST vs PM: POST faster", "POST vs PM: PM faster",
    "POST vs MAX: POST faster", "POST vs MAX: MAX faster",
    # Co-decreasing
    "MAX vs PM: MAX faster↓", "MAX vs PM: PM faster↓",
    "POST vs PM: POST faster↓", "POST vs PM: PM faster↓",
    "POST vs MAX: POST faster↓", "POST vs MAX: MAX faster↓",
    # Single domain
    "PM↑ only", "PM↓ only", "MAX↑ only", "MAX↓ only", "POST↑ only", "POST↓ only",
    # Two domain
    "PM+MAX↑", "PM+MAX↓", "PM+POST↑", "PM+POST↓", "MAX+POST↑", "MAX+POST↓",
    # Complex
    "All↑ (interaction)", "All↓ (interaction)", "Any opposite", "Three-way"
  ),
  N_Genes = c(
    # Domain main effects
    length(genes_MAX_higher_than_PM), length(genes_MAX_lower_than_PM),
    length(genes_POST_higher_than_PM), length(genes_POST_lower_than_PM),
    length(genes_POST_higher_than_MAX), length(genes_POST_lower_than_MAX),
    length(genes_MAX_highest), length(genes_POST_highest), length(genes_PM_highest),
    length(genes_AP_decreasing), length(genes_AP_increasing),
    # Stage main effects
    length(genes_increasing_with_development), length(genes_decreasing_with_development),
    length(strong_increasers), length(strong_decreasers),
    # Opposite
    length(genes_MAX_up_PM_down), length(genes_MAX_down_PM_up),
    length(genes_POST_up_PM_down), length(genes_POST_down_PM_up),
    length(genes_POST_up_MAX_down), length(genes_POST_down_MAX_up),
    # Co-increasing
    length(genes_coinc_MAX_faster_PM), length(genes_coinc_PM_faster_MAX),
    length(genes_coinc_POST_faster_PM), length(genes_coinc_PM_faster_POST),
    length(genes_coinc_POST_faster_MAX), length(genes_coinc_MAX_faster_POST),
    # Co-decreasing
    length(genes_codec_MAX_faster_PM), length(genes_codec_PM_faster_MAX),
    length(genes_codec_POST_faster_PM), length(genes_codec_PM_faster_POST),
    length(genes_codec_POST_faster_MAX),
    length(genes_codec_MAX_faster_POST),
    # Single domain
    length(genes_PM_only_up), length(genes_PM_only_down),
    length(genes_MAX_only_up), length(genes_MAX_only_down),
    length(genes_POST_only_up), length(genes_POST_only_down),
    # Two domain
    length(genes_PM_MAX_up), length(genes_PM_MAX_down),
    length(genes_PM_POST_up), length(genes_PM_POST_down),
    length(genes_MAX_POST_up), length(genes_MAX_POST_down),
    # Complex
    length(genes_all_increasing), length(genes_all_decreasing),
    length(genes_opposite_slopes), length(genes_three_way_divergent)
  )
) |>
  filter(N_Genes > 0)

pattern_summary_all |> create_dt()
```

```{r}
#| label: category-summary-plot
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 6

# Summary by category
category_summary <- pattern_summary_all |>
  group_by(Category) |>
  summarize(Total_Genes = sum(N_Genes), N_Patterns = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(Category = fct_reorder(Category, Total_Genes))

ggplot(category_summary, aes(x = Total_Genes, y = Category, fill = Category)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Total_Genes, " (", N_Patterns, " patterns)")), hjust = -0.05, size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
  labs(
    title = "Gene Counts by Pattern Category",
    subtitle = "Numbers show total genes (number of patterns)",
    x = "Number of genes", y = ""
  ) +
  theme_pubclean() +
  xlim(0, max(category_summary$Total_Genes) * 1.3)
```


## Trajectory Heatmap

```{r}
#| label: trajectory-heatmap
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 12

# Create slope matrix for heatmap
if (nrow(trajectory_patterns) > 10) {
  slope_matrix <- trajectory_patterns |>
    select(gene_id, symbol, PM_log2FoldChange, MAX_log2FoldChange, POST_log2FoldChange) |>
    column_to_rownames("gene_id") |>
    select(-symbol) |>
    as.matrix()

  colnames(slope_matrix) <- c("PM", "MAX", "POST")
  slope_matrix[is.na(slope_matrix)] <- 0

  # Limit to max 200 genes for visibility
  if (nrow(slope_matrix) > 200) {
    # Select genes with highest variance in slopes
    slope_var <- apply(slope_matrix, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE)
    top_genes <- names(sort(slope_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:200]
    slope_matrix <- slope_matrix[top_genes, ]
  }

  # Create annotation for overall pattern
  row_annot <- trajectory_patterns |>
    filter(gene_id %in% rownames(slope_matrix)) |>
    select(gene_id, overall_pattern) |>
    column_to_rownames("gene_id")

  pheatmap(slope_matrix,
    color = colorRampPalette(c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"))(100),
    breaks = seq(-3, 3, length.out = 101),
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    show_rownames = FALSE,
    main = "Developmental Slopes by Domain\n(Genes with Interactions)",
    annotation_row = row_annot,
    fontsize = 10
  )
}
```

## Gene-Level Assignments

```{r}
#| label: gene-assignments-table
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# Create comprehensive gene-level table
all_genes_classified <- unique(c(
  b6_domain_main_effects_clean$gene_id,
  b6_stage_main_effects_clean$gene_id,
  trajectory_patterns$gene_id
))

gene_level_summary <- tibble(gene_id = all_genes_classified) |>
  left_join(all_genes_palate |> select(gene_id, symbol, chromosome), by = "gene_id") |>
  mutate(
    # Main effects
    Has_Domain_Effect = gene_id %in% b6_domain_main_effects_clean$gene_id,
    Has_Stage_Effect = gene_id %in% b6_stage_main_effects_clean$gene_id,
    Has_Interaction = gene_id %in% genes_with_interaction,

    # Domain patterns
    Domain_Pattern = case_when(
      gene_id %in% genes_PM_highest ~ "Highest in PM",
      gene_id %in% genes_MAX_highest ~ "Highest in MAX",
      gene_id %in% genes_POST_highest ~ "Highest in POST",
      gene_id %in% genes_AP_decreasing ~ "A→P decreasing",
      gene_id %in% genes_AP_increasing ~ "A→P increasing",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    # Stage direction
    Stage_Direction = case_when(
      gene_id %in% genes_increasing_with_development ~ "Increasing",
      gene_id %in% genes_decreasing_with_development ~ "Decreasing",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |>
  # Add trajectory pattern for interaction genes
  left_join(
    trajectory_patterns |> select(gene_id, overall_pattern, MAX_PM_pattern, POST_PM_pattern, POST_MAX_pattern),
    by = "gene_id"
  )

gene_level_summary |>
  select(
    gene_id, symbol, chromosome, Has_Domain_Effect, Has_Stage_Effect, Has_Interaction,
    Domain_Pattern, Stage_Direction, overall_pattern
  ) |>
  create_dt()
```

## Over-representation Results Combined

```{r}
#| label: all-ora-summary
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# Combine all ora results
all_ora_results <- bind_rows(
  # Domain effects
  genes_MAX_higher_than_PM_ora$result,
  genes_MAX_lower_than_PM_ora$result,
  genes_POST_higher_than_PM_ora$result,
  genes_POST_lower_than_PM_ora$result,
  genes_POST_higher_than_MAX_ora$result,
  genes_POST_lower_than_MAX_ora$result,
  genes_PM_highest_ora$result,
  genes_MAX_highest_ora$result,
  genes_POST_highest_ora$result,
  genes_AP_decreasing_ora$result,
  genes_AP_increasing_ora$result,
  # Stage effects
  dev_increasing_ora$result,
  dev_decreasing_ora$result,
  # Trajectory patterns
  ora_MAX_up_PM_down$result,
  ora_MAX_down_PM_up$result,
  ora_POST_up_PM_down$result,
  ora_POST_down_PM_up$result,
  ora_coinc_MAX_faster$result,
  ora_coinc_POST_faster$result,
  # Domain-specific
  ora_PM_only_up$result,
  ora_PM_only_down$result,
  ora_MAX_only_up$result,
  ora_MAX_only_down$result,
  ora_POST_only_up$result,
  ora_POST_only_down$result,
  ora_PM_MAX_up$result,
  ora_MAX_POST_up$result,
  ora_PM_POST_up$result,
  # Complex
  ora_all_increasing$result,
  ora_all_decreasing$result,
  ora_opposite$result,
  ora_three_way$result
)

if (!is.null(all_ora_results) && nrow(all_ora_results) > 0) {
  # Add category
  all_ora_results <- all_ora_results |>
    mutate(
      Category = case_when(
        gene_set %in% c(
          "MAX higher than PM", "MAX lower than PM",
          "POST higher than PM", "POST lower than PM",
          "POST higher than MAX", "POST lower than MAX",
          "PM highest", "MAX highest", "POST highest",
          "A→P decreasing", "A→P increasing"
        ) ~ "Domain Main Effects",
        gene_set %in% c("Increase", "Decrease") ~ "Stage Main Effects",
        gene_set %in% c("MAX↑ PM↓", "MAX↓ PM↑", "POST↑ PM↓", "POST↓ PM↑") ~ "Opposite Trajectories",
        gene_set %in% c("Co-increasing: MAX faster", "Co-increasing: POST faster") ~ "Co-increasing", 
        grepl("only", gene_set) ~ "Domain-Specific",
        grepl("\\+", gene_set) ~ "Two-Domain",
        gene_set %in% c("All↑", "All↓", "Opposite slopes", "Three-way divergent") ~ "Complex",
        TRUE ~ "Other"
      )
    ) |>
    select(Category, gene_set, source, term_name, p_value, intersection_size, term_size) |>
    filter(as.numeric(p_value) < 0.01) |>
    arrange(Category, gene_set, p_value)

  all_ora_results |> create_dt()
}
```

:::


# Over-representation Summary

::: {#B6_ora_summary .panel-tabset .nav-pills}
## Co-increasing

**MAX faster**
- ECM / collagen (dominant signal)
- Bone & skeletal: osteoblast morphology, bone mineral density, ossification, trabecular bone, skeletal physiology
- Skin & epidermis: hair follicle, keratinocyte, stratum granulosum, skin tensile strength
- Motile cilia / axoneme
- Wnt & Hippo signaling; ESC pluripotency
- Heart development, right ventricle hypertrophy, situs inversus / laterality defects
- Cancer pathways (breast, basal cell, gastric)
- Postnatal growth retardation

**POST faster**
- ECM (dominant signal)
- Nail dystrophy, blistering, keratoderma, skin barrier
- Dental abnormalities (hypoplasia, enamel)
- Alopecia
- Motile cilia; situs inversus
- Nociception (thermal, mechanical, chemical thresholds)
- Apical plasma membrane
- Hormone level regulation

---

## Complex

**All↑**
- ECM / collagen (dominant signal)
- Bone & skeletal: osteoclast/osteoblast, trabecular bone, ossification, bone mineral density (both increased and decreased), epiphyseal plate, osteopetrosis
- Muscle: contraction, myofibril, sarcomere, dystrophy, muscle fiber morphology
- Immune & inflammation: leukocyte/granulocyte chemotaxis & migration, cytokine activity, chemokine secretion, susceptibility to infection
- Skin: keratoderma, keratinocyte, cornified envelope, alopecia
- Calcium / ion homeostasis
- Joint contracture & stiffness (multiple joint sites)
- Cardiac: hypertrophy, fibrosis, dilated cardiomyopathy
- Dental abnormalities
- T cell / B cell / macrophage numbers
- Vascular: wound healing, angiogenesis, permeability

**Opposite slopes**
- Cervical vertebrae morphology (atlas, axis)
- Small olfactory bulb
- Neuroactive ligand-receptor interaction
- Organismal stress response

**Three-way divergent**
- NFATc4 transcription factor motif only

---

## Domain Main Effects

**A→P decreasing**
- Wnt signaling (canonical & non-canonical)
- Reproductive tract development (Wolffian duct, Müllerian duct, uterus)
- Hair / vibrissa morphology
- Nephric duct / mesonephric tubule morphogenesis

**MAX higher than PM**
- Synaptic: synaptic membrane, postsynaptic specialization, synapse organization, chemical synaptic transmission
- Neuronal: neuron projection development, growth cone, axon development, neuron differentiation
- Cognition, learning, memory
- Coordination, locomotion, gait
- Ion channels (cation, potassium)
- Seizures, tremors
- NRSF transcription factor motif

**MAX highest**
- Myelin sheath
- Muscle hypoplasia (intercostal, tongue)

**MAX lower than PM**
- Skeletal system development & morphogenesis
- Platelet function (aggregation, mean platelet volume)
- ECM / basement membrane
- Cartilage & connective tissue development
- Limb / appendage morphogenesis
- Heart morphogenesis; EMT
- TGF-beta signaling; Hippo signaling
- Kidney / renal development
- Elastic fibre formation

**PM highest**
- Xenobiotic response
- Postnatal lethality
- Hair shaft / skin barrier function
- Motor learning
- Cardiovascular physiology
- Platelet aggregation
- Apical plasma membrane

**POST higher than MAX**
- Cell-cell adhesion (plasma membrane)
- Muscle: contraction, myofibril, sarcomere, myopathy, diaphragm, Z line morphology
- Synapse organization
- Respiratory distress, cyanosis
- Bone mineral density
- ECM / collagen
- Wound healing

**POST higher than PM**
- Synaptic (dominant signal): postsynaptic density/membrane, synaptic membrane, chemical synaptic transmission
- Ion channels (broad: cation, gated)
- Muscle: contraction, myofibril, sarcomere
- ECM
- Neuronal behavior: anxiety, locomotion, learning, memory
- Membrane potential regulation
- Neuronal system (Reactome)

**POST highest**
- Respiratory distress, cyanosis, hypoxia
- Muscle: actin binding, contraction, sarcomere, Z line
- Diaphragm morphology
- Cell-cell adhesion

**POST lower than MAX**
- Synapse organization & assembly
- Epidermis / skin development; cornified envelope
- Basal cell carcinoma; Wnt signaling
- Neuron differentiation / cell fate commitment
- Kidney development (nephron, ureteric bud, mesonephric tubule)
- Axon guidance
- Desmosome

**POST lower than PM**
- Odontogenesis / dental development
- Neonatal lethality
- Embryonic morphogenesis & organ development
- ECM; cornified envelope; desmosome
- Skeletal development / ossification / osteoblast differentiation
- Kidney development (mesonephros, ureteric bud)
- Wnt signaling
- Cell junction assembly; transcription repressor activity
- Female fertility
- Skin: keratoderma, epidermal acanthosis

---

## Domain-Specific

**MAX↑ only**
- Lung morphology
- Neuronal system / neurotransmitter receptors
- Craniofacial: nasal capsule, basisphenoid, palate
- Hair follicle

**PM↑ only**
- Regulation of system process
- Response to cocaine; noise-induced hearing loss
- Blood vessel morphogenesis
- Synaptic transmission (positive regulation)
- ECM
- Glutamate:sodium symporter; integrin binding
- Intestine morphology; odontogenesis

**PM↓ only**
- Cation / metal ion transmembrane transport
- Symporter activity

**POST↑ only**
- Ion channels (dominant signal): presynaptic membrane, voltage-gated channels
- Synaptic transmission / modulation
- Membrane potential regulation
- Neurotransmitter transport & secretion; synaptic vesicle
- Gliogenesis / glial differentiation
- Heart contraction & circulation
- Coordination; exploration behavior

**POST↓ only**
- Tissue morphogenesis; embryonic morphogenesis
- Nervous system development
- Neural crest / pharyngeal arch derivatives: middle ear ossicles, craniofacial bones, Meckel's cartilage
- Vertebral / rib abnormalities; neural tube
- GnRH deficiency
- Skin pigmentation

---

## Opposite Trajectories

**MAX↑ PM↓**
- EEG multifocal slow activity

**MAX↓ PM↑**
- Nociception (inflammatory pain)
- Sympathetic nervous system physiology
- Sensory neuron innervation

---

## Stage Main Effects

**Decrease**
- Erythrocyte / hemoglobin (dominant signal): gas transport, oxygen carrier, hemoglobin complex, red cell osmotic fragility
- SRF transcription factor motifs
- Erythrocyte differentiation; myeloid cell differentiation
- Platelet (macrothrombocytopenia)

**Increase**
- Motile cilia / axoneme / flagellum (dominant signal): cilium movement, sperm motility, ciliary dyskinesia
- ECM / collagen (dominant signal)
- Immune & inflammation: leukocyte activation & migration, cytokine production, defense response, macrophage, innate & adaptive immunity
- Ion channels (broad: cation, gated, ligand-gated, voltage-gated)
- Skin: cornified envelope, keratoderma, epidermal thickening, acanthosis
- Bone: ossification, mineralization, trabecular bone, osteoblast
- GPCR signaling
- Respiratory: sinusitis, bronchiectasis, airway obstruction
- Situs / laterality defects
- Endopeptidase / serine protease activity
- Bacterial infection susceptibility
- MHC / antigen processing & presentation
- Collagen biosynthesis & degradation

---

## Two-Domain

**MAX+POST↑**
- Cilia / axoneme (dominant signal)
- Microtubule-based movement
- Sperm axoneme assembly
- Synaptic signaling (modulation)
- Seizure susceptibility

**PM+MAX↑**
- Skeletal muscle (dominant signal): sarcomere, myofibril, contraction, myopathy, dystrophy, muscle fiber types, atrophy
- Cardiac: cardiomyopathy, conduction defects, arrhythmia, heart failure, cardiac muscle development
- Ion channels: cation, potassium, calcium, ligand-gated
- Neuromuscular junction; acetylcholine receptor/signaling
- ECM / collagen
- Joint contractures
- Bone: remodeling, osteoblast, osteoclast
- Respiratory insufficiency (muscle weakness related)

**PM+POST↑**
- Neuroactive ligand-receptor interaction (GPCRs)
- Neurotransmitter receptors (serotonin, monoamine)
- Nociception (mechanical)
- Membrane potential regulation

---

## Cross-Category Patterns

- **ECM / collagen** appears across nearly every co-increasing and complex category, as well as stage-increasing and multiple domain main effect sets — the most pervasive signal overall.
- **Motile cilia / axoneme** is prominent in stage-increasing and the MAX+POST↑ two-domain set, and also recurs in co-increasing (both MAX and POST faster).
- **Skeletal muscle / sarcomere / myopathy** dominates the PM+MAX↑ two-domain set and appears in several POST-related domain main effect sets (POST higher than MAX, POST highest, POST higher than PM).
- **Synaptic / neuronal** terms concentrate in MAX-higher-than-PM and POST-higher-than-PM domain main effects, POST↑-only domain-specific, and the PM+POST↑ two-domain set.
- **Bone / skeletal development** phenotypes are widespread across co-increasing (MAX faster), complex (All↑), stage-increasing, and multiple domain main effect contrasts.
- **Skin / epidermis / keratinization** recurs across co-increasing, complex (All↑), stage-increasing, and POST-lower-than-PM domain main effects.
- **Immune / inflammation** (leukocyte migration, cytokine production, infection susceptibility) is concentrated in complex (All↑) and stage-increasing sets.
- **Ion channels** (cation, potassium, voltage-gated, ligand-gated) appear broadly in neuronal/synaptic sets (MAX higher, POST higher, POST↑ only) and in PM+MAX↑ muscle-related enrichments.
- **Erythrocyte / hemoglobin / gas transport** is specific to the stage-decreasing set — the only category with this signature.
- **Wnt signaling** concentrates in A→P decreasing domain main effects, POST-lower-than-MAX, and co-increasing MAX faster.
- **Cardiac** phenotypes (cardiomyopathy, conduction, arrhythmia, heart failure) are most prominent in PM+MAX↑ two-domain, with scattered appearances in complex (All↑) and co-increasing (MAX faster).
- **Laterality / situs** defects appear in co-increasing (both MAX and POST faster), complex (All↑), and stage-increasing.

:::

# Session Info

```{r}
#| label: session-info

sessionInfo()
```
